opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My legs and backside are covered in hundreds of painful, itchy white pimples. It flared up completely out of nowhere after my long run yesterday.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A sudden widespread itchy pustular rash on my thighs, calves and buttocks after a long run.

symptom_narrative.onset: 24 hours ago, after a long run in tight leggings
symptom_narrative.character: hundreds of tiny itchy, mildly tender white-headed spots around hairs
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: very itchy, sleep disrupted; only mild pain
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: some spots burst leaving tiny crusts; no fever; no hot-tub use

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: long-distance run in tight lycra leggings in humid conditions, heavy sweating

communication_style.typical_message_style: focused on the itch and appearance

objective_data_offered.value: hundreds of tiny 1-3mm white-headed spots each centred on a hair with a small red ring, on thighs/calves/buttocks; normal skin in between; a few tiny crusts
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot palpate for deeper nodules
